title: hymenophyllum capillare var. alternialatum
intro: Hymenophyllum capillare var. alternialatum is a fern-like plant species, a type of filmy fern, native to the tropical regions of Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum capillare var. alternialatum include its potential to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions, including eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
